note: Third-party API costs are based on typical public SaaS/API pricing and tiered rates. Replace defaults with your actual provider rates and negotiated discounts.

api_categories.name: Web search (Brave / SerpAPI / Tavily / Perplexity)
api_categories.notes: Per-query search API cost. Caching and query deduplication can cut spend 30-70%.

api_categories.name: Maps / geocoding (Google Maps / Mapbox / OpenStreetMap)
api_categories.notes: Geocoding, routing, places, and distance-matrix lookups. Often volume-tiered.

api_categories.name: Weather / market data (OpenWeather / Finnhub / Polygon)
api_categories.notes: Per-call data feeds; real-time websocket or tick data can be significantly more expensive.

api_categories.name: CRM / helpdesk action (Salesforce / HubSpot / Zendesk)
api_categories.notes: API operations per record: read, create, update, or search. Rate-limit retries add cost.

api_categories.name: Payment / billing (Stripe / PayPal / Paddle)
api_categories.notes: Idempotent retries are essential. Cost includes transaction fees on some platforms; enter blended per-call cost.

api_categories.name: Email send / deliverability (Resend / Postmark / Mailgun)
api_categories.notes: Per-message send cost. Bounces and retries still consume quota.

api_categories.name: SMS / chat (Twilio / MessageBird / WhatsApp Business)
api_categories.notes: Per-outbound-message cost; international and WhatsApp template rates vary widely.

api_categories.name: Object / blob storage (S3 / R2 / Cloudflare Images)
api_categories.notes: Per-operation cost for read/write/list. Large transfers dominate at scale.

api_categories.name: Custom internal / partner API
api_categories.notes: Average custom API with mixed internal and external dependencies.
